'''Dané''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] in training to become one of the elite [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaidens]] serving the [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Queen of Naboo]]. Trained by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]], she was a competent fighter, and later went into business for herself as a [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]], [[Spy/Legends|spy]], and [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]].

==Biography==
Dané, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], had once hoped to become a [[Music/Legends|musical]] performer, and she trained on several [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] instruments in her early teens. When she was 16, the untimely [[Death/Legends|death]] of her [[Parent/Legends|parents]] left her with a struggling [[Farm/Legends|farm]] and a great deal of debt. Out of options, she let her debtors take ownership of the property, and then journeyed to the nearest large [[City/Legends|city]], [[Keren/Legends|Keren]], bidding farewell to the home that had been in her family for generations. Using the last of her personal savings, she volunteered for the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. After training for a year with the [[Queen/Legends|Queen's]] [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaidens]] in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], she impressed [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]] with her keen mind, sharp wits, and natural mimicry skills. Dané did not take well to authority, however, and she requested a transfer from the program. Panaka recommended she look into the Customs Security division, where she soon found a new home on the undercover investigations unit, which allowed her to operate more or less on her own.

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], she became a member of the [[Naboo Underground]] and played a minor role in defending Naboo from [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] forces.

Later, she found that her role in Customs Security was not big enough for her ambitions, and she left the division after less than three [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Dané had learned much in that time, and developed into a sharp shot with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster]], as well as a persuasive negotiator. She had also developed a somewhat flexible morality that was out of place on pastoral Naboo, so she decided the time was ripe to go into business for herself.

Loaning out her skills to those with the most [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], her reputation grew with each successful contract. She worked as personal [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] for a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Noble/Legends|noble]], as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for a rival family in the household of a wealthy [[Chagrian/Legends|Chagrian]], and several times was contracted to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] unfortunate targets. Her initial reservations over becoming a contract killer soon fell by the wayside as the credits continued to roll in. Dané believed that as long as she dealt fairly with those who employed her, she had every right to a clear conscience.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game|''Star Wars: Invasion of Theed'' Adventure Game]] {{1st}}
